# Mapes Baptist Church

> A Baptist church in Vanderhoof, BC, Canada. Sunday morning worship at 11:00 AM. All are welcome. Led by Pastor Ron DeMoss.

Mapes Baptist Church is located at 11054 Blackwater Rd, Vanderhoof, BC. Phone: +1 (250) 567-4673. Email: redemoss@gmail.com. The church holds to the Canadian National Baptist Convention (CNBC) Statement of Faith, based on the Baptist Faith & Message 2000.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.mapeschurch.com/): Overview of the church, service times, pastor bio, photo gallery, and contact information.
- [Sermons](https://www.mapeschurch.com/sermons.html): Audio and video sermon archive from Pastor Ron DeMoss.
- [Statement of Faith](https://www.mapeschurch.com/faith.html): 18 core doctrines based on the CNBC Statement of Faith and Baptist Faith & Message 2000.
- [Membership](https://www.mapeschurch.com/membership.html): Information about joining the church family and the membership process.
- [Give](https://www.mapeschurch.com/give.html): Online giving options to support the ministry of Mapes Baptist Church.
- [VBS 2026](https://www.mapeschurch.com/vbs.html): Illumination Station Vacation Bible School, July 12–16 2026, 6:30–8:30 PM. Open to Kindergarten through Grade 12. Registration form included.
